title: Tessco 3 Pcs Spherical Potion Bottles Round Glass Bottles Clear Potion Jars Large Decorative Witch Bottles for Halloween Christmas Costume Props DIY Crafts Decoration(4.13 inches,Cork Stopper)
description:
About this item
Large Capacity: our potion bottles with cork have capacity of approx. approx. 250 ml/ 8.5 oz, approx. 4.13 inches/ 10.5 cm in height, large enough for you to hold multiple items, also suitable for you to store and hold
What You Will Get: you will get totally 3 pieces of glass bottles with cork, clear and delicate, enough for you to use and share with your families, friends, relatives, colleagues, and others, and you can also send them as gifts to others
Wide Range of Applications: these potion bottles are suitable for you to apply as perfume bottles, message bottles, storage accessories, party gifts, costume props and so on, also ideal for making some DIY crafts and decorations, and you can fill in colorful small items in the bottles to make them more attractive
Reusable and Stable: these Halloween water bottle is mainly made of solid and thick glass material, with nice workmanship and smooth surface, not easy to break, bend, or deform, and our cork topper can well fit for the bottle, bringing you a comfortable using experience
Ideal Choice as Gifts: it is quite considerate of you to choose these glass bottles to send to your lover, friends, families, and neighbors, and you can fill these round cork bottles with trinkets, such as dried flower petals, beach sand, essential oils, and other suitable items, bringing more fun and interest to these gift receivers
› See more product details
reviews_5s:
Play Video
Great quality, corks fit fine, I use mine for mixed drinks, super happy with purchase!Nice decor bottles or storage for sugar/cinnamon/potionsI like the quality of the glass and cork. Well worth the price in my opinion. The size is perfect for what it was intended for.Very good in quality, very fun in cosplay. Would definitely recommend.Product was exactly as described - good price for what you get.I originally purchased these for use in a homemade "flask-lock" Artificer prop weapon. I accidentally dropped one onto a concrete and tile floor from about 4 ft. My heart stopped for a moment, but as it turned out, it didn't even crack! It appears to be the same thickness all over its surface, and it's still serviceable to this day! Highly recommended!Have been using these for special “potion cocktails” and they’re great! They’ve held up well, and my buddy enjoys using them even as just a regular drinking cup.

Mostly just love these for the aesthetics in our cocktails!True to size- perfect for a Halloween craft that we will be doing this weekend! Cannot wait!These are perfect for my Halloween projects! I love filling bottle with things to creep out my kids and these are just the right size!
